---
title: "GROUP PROJECT – DATA ANALYSIS PROJECT"
subtitle: "Timeline"

format:
  html:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false

execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  freeze: auto
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(lubridate)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

options(scipen = 999)

# --- Load -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Assumes this file is in /boland_course/syllabus/ and CSV is in /boland_course/syllabus/data/
cd <- read_csv("data/class_dates.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(
    code = str_trim(code),
    due_reg_dt = mdy(due_reg_dt)  # your CSV uses m/d/YYYY
  )

# --- Validate ---------------------------------------------------------------
needed_codes <- c("C5","C6","C7","C8","C9","C11","C12")
missing_codes <- setdiff(needed_codes, cd$code)
if (length(missing_codes) > 0) {
  stop(paste("class_dates.csv is missing these codes:", paste(missing_codes, collapse = ", ")))
}

# --- Helpers ----------------------------------------------------------------
fmt_md <- function(d) format(d, "%B %d") |> str_replace(" 0", " ")

kbl_course <- function(df) {
  if (knitr::is_latex_output()) {
    kbl(df, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE) |>
      kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"))
  } else {
    kbl(df, format = "html") |>
      kable_paper("striped", full_width = FALSE)
  }
}

get_due <- function(code_val) {
  cd |>
    filter(code == code_val) |>
    pull(due_reg_dt) |>
    first() |>
    fmt_md()
}

timeline <- tibble(
  Task = c(
    "Launch in Class",
    "Analysis Plan Due",
    "Clean Data Set Due",
    "Pre-Coaching Presentation Due",
    "Coaching Sessions",
    "Final Presentations",
    "Final R Documentation Due"
  ),
  #pulling due dates so start a week earlier
  Date = c(
    get_due("C4"),
    get_due("C5"),
    get_due("C6"),
    get_due("C7"),
    get_due("C8"),
    get_due("C10"),
    get_due("C11")
  )
)
```

## Timeline for Group Project

```{r}
kbl_course(timeline)
```
